reason: Warning sign asks what it warns about; correct answer 1 = 'Про те, що дорога виходить на берег водойми або набережну'. Official Ukrainian sign 1.8 from Wikimedia Commons (UA_road_sign_1.8.svg): red warning triangle with a car driving off a quay/embankment into water (waves below). Rendered to PNG (33_230.png) and visually verified to match the embankment/riverbank-exit meaning.
